lede: A look at November 5 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Matty Beniers and Alexa Chung, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Donald Trump
events.desc: Donald Trump becomes the first president of the United States to be elected to a non-consecutive second term in 132 years, since Grover Cleveland won the 1892 election.

events.title: President of Pakistan
events.desc: Pakistani President Farooq Leghari dismisses the government of Prime Minister Benazir Bhutto and dissolves the National Assembly.

events.title: Korean War
events.desc: Korean War: British and Australian forces from the 27th British Commonwealth Brigade successfully halted the advancing Chinese 117th Division during the Battle of Pakchon.

events.title: Bombing of Rome in World War II
events.desc: World War II: Bombing of the Vatican.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: The British armed merchant cruiser HMS Jervis Bay is sunk by the German pocket battleship Admiral Scheer.

events.title: Everett massacre
events.desc: The Everett massacre takes place in Everett, Washington as political differences lead to a shoot-out between the Industrial Workers of the World organizers and local police.

events.title: Women's suffrage in the United States
events.desc: Women's suffrage in the United States: In defiance of the law, suffragist Susan B. Anthony votes for the first time, and is later fined $100.

events.title: Seven Years' War
events.desc: Seven Years' War: Frederick the Great defeats the allied armies of France and the Holy Roman Empire at the Battle of Rossbach.

events.title: Second Battle of Panipat
events.desc: Second Battle of Panipat: Fighting begins between the forces of Hem Chandra Vikramaditya, the Hindu king at Delhi and the forces of the Muslim emperor Akbar.

events.title: Lý Anh Tông
events.desc: Lý Anh Tông is enthroned as emperor of Vietnam at the age of two, beginning a 37-year reign.

births.name: Pat Kilbane
births.line: American actor, comedian, director and screenwriter

deaths.text: Ben Baldanza, American economist and business executive
Mack Sennett, Canadian-American actor, director, producer, and screenwriter
Theodor von Heuglin, German explorer and ornithologist

observances.text: Christian feast day: All Jesuit Saints and Blesseds
Christian feast day: Saint Domninus of Grenoble
Christian feast day: Elizabeth, the mother of John the Baptist
Christian feast day: Blessed Guido Maria Conforti
